---
title: "Senteur AI - Application"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(slam)
library(Matrix)
library(tidytext)
library(tm)
library(text2vec)
library(sentimentr)
library(proxy) 
library(cluster)

library(shiny)
library(shinythemes)
library(janitor)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(stringi)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r}
library(readr)
#final_perfume_data <- read_csv("final_perfume_data.csv")

clean_perfume_data <- function(input_path, output_path) {
  

  data <- read_csv(input_path, col_types = cols()) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ stri_encode(., "", "UTF-8"))) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.character), str_trim)) %>%
    janitor::clean_names() %>%
    drop_na(name, brand, description) %>%
    mutate(notes = replace_na(notes, "Unknown")) %>%
    distinct()

  write_csv(data, output_path)
}

#clean_perfume_data("final_perfume_data.csv", "clean_perfume_data.csv")

ui <- fluidPage(
  theme = shinytheme("cyborg"),
  tags$head(
    tags$style(HTML("
      @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;600&display=swap');
      body, label, input, button, select, .tabbable .nav-tabs > li > a {
        font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
        color: #eaeaea;
        background-color: #1a1a1a;
      }

      .tabbable .nav-tabs {
        justify-content: center;
        background-color: transparent;
      }

      .tabbable .nav-tabs > li > a {
        color: #eaeaea;
        background-color: transparent;
        border: none;
        font-weight: 600;
        padding: 15px;
      }

      .tabbable .nav-tabs > li.active > a, 
      .tabbable .nav-tabs > li > a:hover {
        color: #fff;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6a4f3b, #d1b99d);
        border-radius: 8px;
      }

      .perfume-card {
        border: 1px solid #333;
        border-radius: 12px;
        padding: 20px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
        background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2b2b2b, #1b1b1b);
        box-shadow: 5px 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        display: flex;
        color: #eaeaea;
      }

      .perfume-image-container {
        flex: 0 0 150px;
        padding-right: 20px;
      }

      .perfume-image {
        max-height: 150px;
        max-width: 100%;
        object-fit: contain;
        border-radius: 8px;
      }

      .perfume-info {
        flex: 1;
      }

      .perfume-name {
        font-size: 1.6em;
        font-weight: 600;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        color: #d1b99d;
      }

      .perfume-brand {
        font-style: italic;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        color: #cccccc;
      }

      .perfume-notes {
        color: #bdbdbd;
      }

      .btn, .action-button {
        background-color: #a98467 !important;
        border-color: #a98467 !important;
        color: #111111 !important;
        font-weight: bold;
        border-radius: 8px;
      }

      .btn:hover {
        background-color: #c19f80 !important;
        border-color: #c19f80 !important;
        color: #000000 !important;
      }

      .app-title {
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 3em;
        color: #d1b99d;
        font-weight: 600;
        margin-top: 30px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
      }
    "))
  ),
  div(class = "app-title", "Senteur AI"),
  tabsetPanel(
    type = "tabs",
    tabPanel("Find Similar Perfumes",
             sidebarLayout(
               sidebarPanel(
                 selectInput("perfume_select", "Select a perfume:", choices = NULL),
                 actionButton("find_similar", "Find Similar Perfumes"),
                 width = 3
               ),
               mainPanel(
                 h3("Top 3 Most Similar Perfumes"),
                 uiOutput("similar_perfumes"),
                 width = 9
               )
             )
    ),
    tabPanel("Find by Notes",
             sidebarLayout(
               sidebarPanel(
                 textInput("note_input", "Enter fragrance notes:", 
                           placeholder = "e.g., vanilla, jasmine"),
                 actionButton("find_by_notes", "Find Best Matches"),
                 width = 3
               ),
               mainPanel(
                 h3("Top 3 Recommended Perfumes"),
                 uiOutput("note_recommendations"),
                 width = 9
               )
             )
    ),
    tabPanel("Find by Vibe",
             sidebarLayout(
               sidebarPanel(
                 selectInput("vibe_input", "Select a vibe:", 
                             choices = c("Clean Girl", "Warm & Cozy", "Tropical", 
                                         "Romantic", "Sexy & Bold", 
                                         "Fresh", "Sweet & Yummy", "Skin Scent", "Androgynous", "Nutty")),
                 actionButton("find_by_vibe", "Find Perfumes"),
                 width = 3
               ),
               mainPanel(
                 h3("Recommended Perfumes"),
                 uiOutput("vibe_recommendations"),
                 width = 9
               )
             )
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  perfume_data <- reactive({
    data <- read_csv("clean_perfume_data.csv") 
    required_cols <- c("name", "brand", "description", "notes", "image_url")
    if (!all(required_cols %in% colnames(data))) {
      stop("Dataset must contain: ", paste(required_cols, collapse = ", "))
    }
    return(data)
  })

  observe({
    updateSelectInput(session, "perfume_select", 
                      choices = unique(perfume_data()$name))
  })

  get_similar_perfumes <- function(input_name, data) {
    target_row <- data %>% filter(name == input_name)
    if (nrow(target_row) == 0) return(data.frame())

    target_notes <- target_row$notes
    all_notes <- c(target_notes, data$notes)
    tokens <- strsplit(tolower(all_notes), "[ ,]+")
    it <- itoken(tokens)
    vocab <- create_vocabulary(it)
    vectorizer <- vocab_vectorizer(vocab)
    dtm <- create_dtm(it, vectorizer)
    sim_scores <- as.numeric(sim2(dtm[-1, ], dtm[1, , drop = FALSE]))

    data %>%
      mutate(Similarity = round(sim_scores, 3)) %>%
      filter(name != input_name) %>%
      arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
      head(3)
  }

  get_top_perfumes_for_notes <- function(input_notes, data) {
    if (input_notes == "") return(data.frame())

    all_notes <- c(input_notes, data$notes)
    tokens <- strsplit(tolower(all_notes), "[ ,]+")
    it <- itoken(tokens)
    vocab <- create_vocabulary(it)
    vectorizer <- vocab_vectorizer(vocab)
    dtm <- create_dtm(it, vectorizer)
    sim_scores <- as.numeric(sim2(dtm[-1, ], dtm[1, , drop = FALSE]))

    data %>%
      mutate(Similarity = round(sim_scores, 3)) %>%
      arrange(desc(Similarity)) %>%
      head(3)
  }

  perfume_data_with_vibes <- reactive({
    perfume_data() %>%
      mutate(vibe = case_when(
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "musk|aldehydes|cotton|ambrette") ~ "Clean Girl",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "vanilla|amber|tonka bean|cedarwood") ~ "Warm & Cozy",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "coconut|pineapple|tropical|franigpani|tiara flower") ~ "Tropical",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "jasmine|ylang ylang|rose|peony|gardenia|tuberose") ~ "Romantic",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "spices|cinnamon|pepper|leather|cherry|frankinsence") ~ "Sexy & Bold",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "citrus|grapefruit|bergamot|lemon|orange blossom|neroli") ~ "Fresh",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "strawberry|chocolate|honey|praline|milk|sugar|caramel|balsam|vanilla") ~ "Sweet & Yummy",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "white musk|ambrette|iso e super|benzoin|cashmeran") ~ "Skin Scent",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "vetiver|basil|iris|patchouli|sandalwood|myrrh|lavender") ~ "Androgynous",
        str_detect(tolower(notes), "pistachio|cardamom|nutmeg|almond|tonka bean") ~ "Nutty",
        TRUE ~ "Other"
      ))
  })

  get_perfumes_by_vibe <- function(vibe, data) {
    data %>%
      filter(vibe == !!vibe) %>%
      sample_n(min(n(), 3))
  }

  output$similar_perfumes <- renderUI({
    req(input$find_similar)
    perfume <- get_similar_perfumes(input$perfume_select, perfume_data())
    if (nrow(perfume) == 0) return(h4("No similar perfumes found"))
    tagList(
      lapply(1:nrow(perfume), function(i) {
        div(class = "perfume-card",
            div(class = "perfume-image-container",
                img(src = perfume$image_url[i], class = "perfume-image", 
                    alt = perfume$name[i], onerror = "this.style.display='none'")),
            div(class = "perfume-info",
                div(class = "perfume-name", perfume$name[i]),
                div(class = "perfume-brand", perfume$brand[i]),
                p(perfume$description[i]),
                div(class = "perfume-notes",
                    p(strong("Notes: "), perfume$notes[i]),
                    p(strong("Similarity: "), round(perfume$Similarity[i], 2))
                )
            )
        )
      })
    )
  })

  output$note_recommendations <- renderUI({
    req(input$find_by_notes)
    perfume <- get_top_perfumes_for_notes(input$note_input, perfume_data())
    if (nrow(perfume) == 0) return(h4("No perfumes found matching these notes"))
    tagList(
      lapply(1:nrow(perfume), function(i) {
        div(class = "perfume-card",
            div(class = "perfume-image-container",
                img(src = perfume$image_url[i], class = "perfume-image", 
                    alt = perfume$name[i], onerror = "this.style.display='none'")),
            div(class = "perfume-info",
                div(class = "perfume-name", perfume$name[i]),
                div(class = "perfume-brand", perfume$brand[i]),
                p(perfume$description[i]),
                div(class = "perfume-notes",
                    p(strong("Notes: "), perfume$notes[i]),
                    p(strong("Similarity: "), round(perfume$Similarity[i], 2))
                )
            )
        )
      })
    )
  })

  output$vibe_recommendations <- renderUI({
    req(input$find_by_vibe)
    perfumes <- get_perfumes_by_vibe(input$vibe_input, perfume_data_with_vibes())
    if (nrow(perfumes) == 0) return(h4("No perfumes found for this vibe"))
    tagList(
      lapply(1:nrow(perfumes), function(i) {
        div(class = "perfume-card",
            div(class = "perfume-image-container",
                img(src = perfumes$image_url[i], class = "perfume-image", 
                    alt = perfumes$name[i], onerror = "this.style.display='none'")),
            div(class = "perfume-info",
                div(class = "perfume-name", perfumes$name[i]),
                div(class = "perfume-brand", perfumes$brand[i]),
                p(perfumes$description[i]),
                div(class = "perfume-notes",
                    p(strong("Notes: "), perfumes$notes[i])
                )
            )
        )
      })
    )
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
